libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: If tests exercise Jersey's OSGi Activator/OsgiRegistry path, compile OSGi test doubles against the OSGi 4.2 API surface and implement the additional interface methods required by that API. No Docker image, environment variable, or system property setup is indicated.

deterministic_setup.reason: com.sun.jersey:jersey-core:1.14 declares org.osgi.core:4.2.0 as a provided dependency and com.sun.jersey.core.osgi.OsgiRegistry references org.osgi.framework.BundleReference, which is absent from org.osgi:osgi_R4_core:1.0.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8875 [Automation] java run fails for com.sun.jersey:jersey-core:1.14; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Do not leave org.osgi:osgi_R4_core:1.0 ahead of org.osgi:org.osgi.core:4.2.0 on the test runtime classpath; duplicate org.osgi.framework classes can preserve the missing BundleReference failure through classpath ordering.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Jersey core 1.14 references the OSGi 4.2 API at runtime; the old OSGi R4 core artifact used by the 1.9 tests does not contain org.osgi.framework.BundleReference, causing the observed Java-run failure.
